items.title: Session schema migrates (sessions, session_messages)
items.evidence: Verified live: 0002_sessions applied as part of 'Batch 1 run: 3 migrations'.

items.title: Server boots with the WebSocket relay attached on /ws/sessions
items.expected: Log line: 'Session WebSocket relay attached path /ws/sessions'
items.evidence: Verified live: startup logged the relay attachment on /ws/sessions.

items.title: Session REST endpoints respond with the envelope
items.expected: { success, data, error } envelope on each
items.evidence: Routes mounted at /api/sessions and typecheck-clean; envelope contract verified across sibling slices live.
items.notes: Listing/creation shape confirmed; full create-with-project exercised via the picker flow.

items.title: Live chat: send a turn, stream a Claude response, persist + restore transcript
items.precondition: Claude CLI logged in (subscription), a project selected
items.expected: Streamed response renders; child process spawns with no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; transcript persists and restores
items.notes: Requires an interactive Claude CLI login on the operator's machine; cannot be exercised headlessly in CI. The spawn explicitly deletes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (verified in code, ClaudeProcessService).

items.title: No orphaned child processes on session close / shutdown
items.expected: PID registry empties; no leftover claude processes
items.notes: Kill-on-shutdown implemented (PID registry + SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers). Verify alongside T4 once the CLI login is available.
